# Fairmas

> Fairmas is a Berlin-based software company (since 2003) specializing in hotel
> financial planning, controlling, reporting and analysis. Its FairPlanner
> platform and related tools serve 5,500+ hotels and 18,000+ users worldwide,
> with 200+ integrations across PMS, ERP, RMS and benchmarking systems.
> Available in English, German, Spanish, French and Italian.

## Products
- [FairPlanner](https://www.fairmas.com/fairplanner): hotel budgeting & forecasting software
- [About our products](https://www.fairmas.com/what-we-do/about-our-products)
- [Financial Planning, Controlling & Reporting](https://www.fairmas.com/what-we-do/financial-planning-controlling-reporting)
- [Cash Flow Planning](https://www.fairmas.com/what-we-do/cash-flow-planning)
- [Revenue Planning & Analytics](https://www.fairmas.com/what-we-do/revenue-planning-and-analytics)
- [Hotel Asset Reporting](https://www.fairmas.com/what-we-do/hotel-asset-reporting)
